summary: Added Mariano Neme (testimony 6) to the testimonials carousel on the Astro static site.

Phase 1 (i18n): Added `testimonials.6.name`, `testimonials.6.location`, and `testimonials.6.text` keys to all three language files: `src/i18n/es.ts` (Spanish original), `src/i18n/en.ts` (English translation), and `src/i18n/zh.ts` (Chinese translation).

Phase 2 (Component): Appended testimony 6 object to the `testimonials[]` array in `src/components/Testimonials.astro` with initials 'MN', photo undefined (initials fallback), and i18n lookups for name/location/text.
Phase 3 (Integration): No additional wiring needed — carousel dots and navigation auto-scale from array length; TestimonialCard.astro already renders initials fallback when photo prop is undefined.
Phase 4 (Validation): `npm run build` completed successfully — 7 pages built with 0 errors.

validation.build: PASSED — 7 pages built in 2.92s, no errors
